entities.name: CROP
entities.description: Agricultural plants used for food or industrial purposes

entities.name: EXPERIMENTAL CROSSES
entities.description: The process of breeding two different individuals to study genetic inheritance

entities.name: CROP POPULATIONS
entities.description: Groups of plants derived from experimental crosses for genetic study

entities.name: COMPLEX TRAITS
entities.description: Phenotypic characteristics controlled by multiple genes

entities.name: PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: The science of changing the traits of plants to produce desired characteristics

entities.name: MULTI-PARENT POPULATIONS
entities.description: Populations derived from multiple founder genomes to increase genetic diversity and mapping resolution

entities.name: GENETIC MAPPING POPULATIONS
entities.description: Populations used to identify the location of genes or markers on a chromosome

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCI
entities.description: Regions of DNA associated with variation in a quantitative trait

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The total number of genetic characteristics in the genetic makeup of a species

entities.name: POPULATION STRUCTURE
entities.description: The non-random distribution of genetic variation within a population

entities.name: INBRED GERMPLASM
entities.description: Genetic material derived from self-pollination or sibling mating

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC DATA
entities.description: Observable physical or biochemical characteristics of an organism

entities.name: GENOTYPIC DATA
entities.description: Information regarding the genetic makeup of an organism

entities.name: GENOMICS APPROACHES
entities.description: Large-scale study of the genome and its functions

entities.name: DE NOVO GENOME ASSEMBLIES
entities.description: The process of assembling a genome without a reference sequence

entities.name: GENE ANNOTATIONS
entities.description: The process of identifying the locations of genes and coding regions in a genome

entities.name: IMPUTATION
entities.description: The statistical estimation of missing genotypes using a reference panel

entities.name: SEQUENCE INFORMATION
entities.description: The specific order of nucleotides in a DNA molecule
